arts.ttl: Man Utd & Liverpool lead race for Cherki - Friday's gossip
arts.sum: Manchester United and Liverpool want Lyon forward Rayan Cherki, Arsenal are targeting Kingsley Coman from Bayern, plus more.

arts.ttl: When did Man Utd last win the Premier League?
arts.sum: However, after so many years at the top of English football with unprecedented success, the departure of Sir Alex Ferguson in 2013 led to a remarkable drop-off in performance, with Man Utd failing to win the English top flight since the Scotsman left his role at the helm. Man Utd have failed to win the Premier League since Ferguson left his role in charge in 2013.

arts.ttl: Man Utd fans unveil first-ever tifo with clear message to players before Lyon clash
arts.sum: Old Trafford saw its first ever tifo unveiled as Manchester United hosted Lyon with the home fans paying tribute to their previous successes in the European Cup

arts.ttl: Paul Scholes reveals what he said to Nemanja Matic about Andre Onana amid 'worst goalkeeper in Man United history' spat
arts.sum: Paul Scholes has opened up on his pre-match interaction with Nemanja Matic after the former Man United midfielder clashed with Andre Onana last week.

arts.ttl: Andre Onana celebrates IN FRONT of the Lyon fans as Man United take early lead in Europa League quarter-final - after horror show in France last week
arts.sum: Manuel Ugarte made it 1-0 within 10 minutes when he fired in from close range following Alejandro Garnacho 's driven pass across the box from the right flank.

arts.ttl: What Andre Onana did after Man United opening goal vs Lyon
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana was back in the spotlight after Manuel Ugarte opened the scoring vs Lyon in the Europa League

arts.ttl: What Paul Scholes 'told' Nemanja Matic amid Andre Onana Man United feud
arts.sum: Manchester United goalkeeper Andre Onana was recently involved in a war of words with Nemanja Matic ahead of the Europa League quarter-final against Lyon

arts.ttl: Man United's new head of recruitment 'watches £86m-rated striker' as Ruben Amorim hunts a new forward this summer
arts.sum: Manchester United are on track to log their worst goalscoring tally in a Premier League campaign ever, eclipsing Louis van Gaal 's final season in 2015-16 when they scored 49 goals.

arts.ttl: 'Some players cannot start' - Ruben Amorim explains Manchester United changes vs Lyon
arts.sum: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has named the same starting XI for the third time in four games.
